case_title: PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP vs. KNOP, ROMAN et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP AS TO DEFENDANT KNOP, ROMAN KNOP, GALLINA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
